auth.description: Enter your API key to continue. The key is only stored for this browser session.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.subtitle: Set up your self-hosted crypto payment gateway in three simple steps.
gettingStarted.step1Description: Add a blockchain network (e.g. Polygon, Ethereum) with your xpub key and RPC endpoints. This is the foundation — necko3 derives unique deposit addresses for every invoice from your xpub.
gettingStarted.step2Description: By default necko3 tracks the chain's native coin. If you want to accept stablecoins like USDC or USDT, add the token contract address and decimals for your chain.
gettingStarted.step3Description: You're all set! Create payment invoices via the API or directly from the admin panel. Each invoice gets a unique deposit address derived from your xpub — no funds touch any intermediary.
gettingStarted.whatIsP1: necko3 is a heavy-duty, industrial-grade processing beast wrapped inside a lightweight, cute shell (if that makes it easier to digest).
gettingStarted.whatIsP2: It was created as an alternative to bloated enterprise solutions, focusing on a simple principle: you pay strictly for what you use and not a penny more, while getting an experience that is equal to, if not better than, the giants.
gettingStarted.builtWithCare: Built with care for merchants who value sovereignty.
gettingStarted.githubSubtitle: Star the repo, report issues, or contribute to the project.

chains.title: Chains
chains.subtitle: Manage blockchain networks and their tokens.
chains.emptyState: No chains configured yet. Add your first chain to get started.
chains.deleteChainDesc: This will permanently remove this chain and all its tokens. This action cannot be undone.

addDialog.title: Add Chain
addDialog.description: Configure a new blockchain network. All fields marked with * are required.
addDialog.name: Name *

addTokenDialog.title: Add Token to {{name}}
addTokenDialog.description: Add an ERC-20 token to track on this chain.

fields.chainTypeTooltip: The blockchain virtual machine type (e.g. EVM). Cannot be changed after creation.
fields.nativeSymbolTooltip: The native coin ticker of this chain (e.g. ETH, POL). Set at creation time.
fields.decimalsTooltip: Number of decimal places for the native coin. Set at creation time.
fields.xpubTooltip: Extended public key used to derive unique deposit addresses for each invoice.
fields.rpcUrlsTooltip: List of RPC node endpoints used to interact with this blockchain. At least one is required.
fields.blockLagTooltip: Number of blocks behind the chain head to start scanning. Helps avoid reorgs.
fields.requiredConfirmationsTooltip: Number of block confirmations needed before a payment is considered confirmed.
fields.lastProcessedBlockTooltip: The last block number processed by the scanner. Set to 0 to start from the latest block in the blockchain.
fields.logoUrlTooltip: URL to the chain's logo image. Displayed in the admin panel.

tokenList.deleteDesc: This will permanently remove the token "{{symbol}}" from this chain. This action cannot be undone.

detail.title: Invoice
detail.cancelDesc: This will permanently cancel the invoice. Any pending payments will no longer be tracked. This action cannot be undone.

create.title: Create Invoice
create.description: Create a new payment invoice. It cannot be edited after creation.
create.noActiveNetworks: No active networks. Add a chain in Chains first.
create.leaveEmpty: Leave empty for the server default.

detail.title: Payment
detail.cancelDesc: This will permanently cancel the payment. This action cannot be undone.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: Track webhook delivery status and retry history.

detail.title: Webhook
detail.cancelDesc: This will permanently cancel the webhook delivery. No further retry attempts will be made. This action cannot be undone.
